_note: Static fixture served by Cloudflare Pages _redirects (/api/health -> /fixtures/health.json) when DEMO_MODE has no live server. Mirrors the union of the live /api/health JSON shape (server.ts: commit + uptime_s; functions/api/health.ts: commit + branch). `ok` + `checks` block was added alongside the new /api/version endpoint so uptime probers see a structured readiness signal.
